findings.description: The `source` directory and its content (Sphinx source code used to generate the HTML) are not mentioned. Source says: '`source` — 開発ポータルサイトのHTMLを生成した Sphinx ソースコードが含まれています'. This is relevant for users who want to understand how the HTML template was generated or who need to make structural modifications.
findings.source_evidence: コンテンツ section: 'source\n    開発ポータルサイトのHTMLを生成した `Sphinx`_ ソースコードが含まれています。'

findings.description: The conditional guidance '変更がなければ' (link to Nablarch content only if the project has not created its own) is omitted. The source specifies this is a fallback: use the Nablarch content only when no project-specific version exists. The knowledge file presents the Nablarch path unconditionally.
findings.source_evidence: 責務配置 row: '変更がなければ、上記(nablarch/library/fw/doc/determining_stereotypes.html)へのリンクとしてください。'

findings.description: The s1 index title is 'プロジェクト概要', but s1 actually covers the template overview, full usage instructions (3 steps + relative-path note), AND the project overview content table. 'プロジェクト概要' is the name of one subsection (h3) in the source, not the top-level topic. A user or retrieval system looking for template usage instructions would not find them under this title.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2 sections 概要, コンテンツ, 利用方法 are all folded into s1, yet the index title reflects only the h3 subsection 'プロジェクト概要'.
